name: pact-monorepo
description: Pact — phones down, everyone in. A shared, consent-gated phone lock for a table, iOS and Android, with an ephemeral relay.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @pact/engine && npm run build -w @pact/relay
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @pact/engine && npm run typecheck -w @pact/relay
scripts.test: npm run build -w @pact/engine && npm run test -w @pact/engine && npm run test -w @pact/relay
